item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1min Alan Shearer at Anfield is asked who his European Cup favourites are and he says 'th
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1min Alan Shearer at Anfield is asked who his European Cup favourites are and he says 'this lot' - meaning PSG.
That's right isn't it? It will be a titanic semi-final for PSG against Bayern or Real, but right now they look the likeliest to be lifting Big Ears again. 7

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 23min Barcelona are OUT of the European Cup.
Barca win 2-1 at Atletico Madrid tonight, b
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 23min Barcelona are OUT of the European Cup.
Barca win 2-1 at Atletico Madrid tonight, but it's not enough as Atletico win 3-2 on aggregate.
Atletico through to the semi-finals. 2 244

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 27min Liverpool are OUT of the European Cup.
Paris Saint-Germain win 2-0 at Anfield toni
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 27min Liverpool are OUT of the European Cup.
Paris Saint-Germain win 2-0 at Anfield tonight, for a 4-0 aggregate victory.
PSG through to the semi-finals. 1 200

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 31min Excited? Nervous?
“Definitely both.”
Liam Pullen is looking forward to his Crucible debut
#Jud
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 31min Excited? Nervous?
“Definitely both.”
Liam Pullen is looking forward to his Crucible debut

Pang Junxu reaches The Crucible for the fourth consecutiv
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 49min 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗚 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗡𝗖𝗘 𝗔𝗚𝗔𝗜𝗡
Pang Junxu reaches The Crucible for the fourth consecutive year after overcoming Jackson Page 10-8 with three centuries to his name Hecho con IA 4 1 mil
